kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Login With Valid Credentials
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Login With Valid Credentials' found. Did you try using keyword 'BuiltIn.Log' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Verify that user can login with valid username and password
test.status: No keyword with name 'Login With Valid Credentials' found. Did you try using keyword 'BuiltIn.Log' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?
